  ⏺ I'll run the tests now.

╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Bash command                                                    │
│                                                                 │
│   make test-integration                                         │
│   Run integration test suite                                    │
│                                                                 │
│ Do you want to proceed?                                         │
│ ❯ 1. Yes                                                        │
│   2. Yes, and don't ask again for make commands in ./cortex1    │
│   3. No, and tell Claude what to do differently (esc)           │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
